metadata.description: Jameson's personal collection of GitHub Copilot agent skills.

plugins.name: authoring
plugins.description: Author and refine Copilot customizations: review agent files, create skills, and build plugins and marketplaces.

plugins.name: decks
plugins.description: Build presentation decks as diffable SVG slides packaged into .pptx.

plugins.name: eng-ops
plugins.description: Operational tooling for git worktrees and .eng/ repo state auditing.

plugins.name: engflow
plugins.description: Engineering workflow agents and skills for GitHub Copilot.

plugins.name: sessions
plugins.description: Collect and query Copilot session-store history.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Local code-quality review with dual sub-agent review and human triage, without opening a PR.

plugins.name: pandoc-docx
plugins.description: Convert markdown to styled .docx using pandoc with a bundled reference template.

plugins.name: slop-check
plugins.description: Detect and fix AI slop in text: vague filler, fake authority, cliches, buzzwords, and low-value structural patterns.

plugins.name: visual-design
plugins.description: Judge and improve the visual design of static artifacts (slides, diagrams, posters, SVG figures) so they read as intentional rather than templated.

plugins.name: work-search
plugins.description: Search and retrieve work information across M365 activity, internal engineering knowledge, and Microsoft documentation.

plugins.name: tech-search
plugins.description: Search internal engineering knowledge (ES Chat, EngHub, Stack Internal, Microsoft Learn) for technical and internal-tool questions.
